output: Executed batch 5 tasks `T8` and `T9`. Pointer clip drag and external HTML5 drop now both route indicator updates through the shared drag coordinator, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, and a checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/video-editor-timeline-well-20260325-1848/execution_batch_5.json`.
deviations: T9: `useTimelineEditing` now keeps a renamed RAF buffer (`externalDragFrameRef` plus `latestExternalDragRef` / `latestExternalPositionRef`) so dragover stays coalesced while removing the old `dragPreviewFrameRef` and `latestDragPreviewRef` helpers.
Advisory observation mismatch: git status/content hash delta found unclaimed files: src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx

task_updates.executor_notes: `useClipDrag` now calls `coordinator.update(...)` during pointer moves and reads `coordinator.lastPosition` on pointer-up. All local indicator element types and helpers were removed, `drop-target-new-track` class toggling was removed from the hook, and cross-track drop resolution now comes from the coordinator state. The floating drag ghost remains imperative via `createFloatingGhost()` and `cloneNode`. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, and `rg -n "document.createElement|ensureIndicator|clearDropIndicators|updateDropTarget|getDropStartTime|getTimelineElements|drop-target-new-track" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts` returns no hits.

`useTimelineEditing` now accepts `coordinator`, uses a RAF-coalesced dragover buffer that calls `coordinator.update(...)`, and resolves drop targets from `coordinator.lastPosition` before calling `coordinator.end()`. The old imperative indicator refs/helpers (`dropIndicatorRef`, `dragPreviewFrameRef`, `latestDragPreviewRef`, `getDropPosition`, `getTimelineDomNodes`) and local `inferDragKind` copy were removed. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, and `rg -n "dropIndicatorRef|dragPreviewFrameRef|latestDragPreviewRef|getDropPosition|getTimelineDomNodes|indicatorRef\\.current\\.show|drop-target-new-track|inferDragKind = useCallback" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineEditing.ts` returns no hits.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `useClipDrag` now routes drag updates through `coordinator.update()` and cleanup through `coordinator.end()`, while still keeping `createFloatingGhost()` as the pointer-specific imperative clone path. `rg -n "document.createElement|ensureIndicator|clearDropIndicators|updateDropTarget|getDropStartTime|getTimelineElements|drop-target-new-track" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts` returns no hits, so the indicator DOM creation path is gone.

The external drag path now uses `coordinator.update()` on dragover and resolves drops from `coordinator.lastPosition` before calling `coordinator.end()`. `rg -n "dropIndicatorRef|dragPreviewFrameRef|latestDragPreviewRef|getDropPosition|getTimelineDomNodes|indicatorRef\\.current\\.show|drop-target-new-track|inferDragKind = useCallback" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineEditing.ts` returns no hits, confirming the old imperative indicator plumbing and local position helpers were removed.
